visual_description: Two men in dark suits sit opposite each other at a small table in a dimly lit room. The man on the left, sporting a mustache, smokes a cigarette, exhales smoke, and places the cigarette in an ashtray while the man on the right, wearing glasses, watches him. The camera focuses on the smoker's face as smoke drifts around him.
